allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "if \(Test-Path 'HKCU:\\Software\\Classes\\claude'\) { Get-ItemProperty 'HKCU:\\Software\\Classes\\claude\\' } else { 'No claude:// scheme registered in HKCU' }")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\claude-config\\dotclaude" -Force | Where-Object { $_.LinkType } | Select-Object Name, LinkType, Target)

PowerShell($items = Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\claude-config\\dotclaude\\scripts","$env:USERPROFILE\\claude-config\\dotclaude\\templates" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Directory; foreach \($i in \(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\claude-config\\dotclaude" -Force -Directory\)\) { if \($i.Attributes -band [System.IO.FileAttributes]::ReparsePoint\) { Write-Output \("JUNCTION: {0} -> {1}" -f $i.Name, $i.Target\) } })
